title: Spacious 2BHK in Indiranagar with Balcony
ownerQuote: It's very quiet at night, and the chai tapri is just around the corner. Metro is a 6-minute walk.

title: Modern 3BHK Apartment in Whitefield
ownerQuote: Gated community with 24/7 water and a really nice jogging track. Lots of families with kids.

title: Cozy 1BHK near MG Road
ownerQuote: Right in the middle of the city. Cafes and breweries on every block, and the metro is downstairs.

title: Budget 1RK in Koramangala
ownerQuote: Perfect for a single working professional. The lane is calm and you can walk to Forum Mall in 10 minutes.

title: Family 2BHK with Garden in HSR Layout
ownerQuote: Ground floor with a private garden. Great for pets. The sector 2 park is 5 minutes away.

title: Premium 3BHK in Indiranagar
ownerQuote: Top floor, corner unit, beautiful light. Walking distance to 100ft Road and CMH.

title: Affordable 1BHK in Electronic City
ownerQuote: Just off the main road, very close to tech parks. Bus to Silk Board every 10 minutes.

title: Stylish 2BHK in Koramangala 5th Block
ownerQuote: Newly renovated, all new appliances. The terrace has a great view of the sunset.

title: 1BHK Studio in Jayanagar
ownerQuote: Quiet residential area, lots of old trees. The 4th block market is a 5 minute walk.

title: Spacious 3BHK in JP Nagar
ownerQuote: Family neighborhood with great schools nearby. Big balconies on both sides.

title: Cozy 1RK near Indiranagar Metro
ownerQuote: Studio apartment, perfect for one person. 2 minute walk to the metro station.

title: 2BHK with Pool in Bellandur
ownerQuote: Pool-facing apartment in a well-maintained complex. Sarjapur Road offices are 10 minutes away.

title: 3BHK Penthouse in Whitefield
ownerQuote: Top floor penthouse with a private terrace. The complex has a tennis court and a kids' play area.

title: 1BHK in Marathahalli
ownerQuote: Walkable to the outer ring road. Lots of food options and tech companies nearby.

title: 2BHK in BTM Layout
ownerQuote: Unfurnished, so you can set it up the way you like. Friendly neighbors, mostly young families.

title: Premium PG in Koramangala (Male)
ownerQuote: Meals included, AC in summers, and a really chill common area. Most flatmates are techies.

title: Cozy PG in HSR Layout (Female)
ownerQuote: Safe and quiet, owner stays nearby. Meals are home-cooked and tasty.

title: Boutique PG in Indiranagar (Co-ed)
ownerQuote: Boutique PG with single occupancy rooms. Comes with cleaning and laundry. House is fully renovated.

title: PG in Whitefield for Working Women
ownerQuote: Vegetarian mess, very homely. Most flatmates work in ITPL and surrounding tech parks.

title: Student PG near Christ University
ownerQuote: Walking distance to Christ and a couple of coaching centers. Study-friendly environment.

title: Budget PG in Indiranagar (Male, Bunk Bed)
ownerQuote: Very basic but clean. Great for freshers who want to live near Indiranagar without breaking the bank.

title: Bright 1BHK near 100 Feet Road, Indiranagar
ownerQuote: Sunlit apartment, east-facing. You can hear the birds in the morning and walk to great brunch spots.

title: Luxury 4BHK Villa in Indiranagar
ownerQuote: Standalone villa with private pool and garden. Perfect for a family that wants space and luxury in the heart of Bangalore.

title: Student PG near Forum Mall, Koramangala
ownerQuote: Basic PG, all meals included. Right behind Forum Mall, so lots to do on weekends.

title: Compact 1BHK in Koramangala 7th Block
ownerQuote: Small but perfectly designed. Floor-to-ceiling windows, modern kitchen. Ideal for a working couple.

title: Premium 3BHK in Koramangala 4th Block
ownerQuote: The apartment overlooks a well-maintained club. Host dinner parties in the huge living area with a view.

title: Budget 1RK in Whitefield near ITPL
ownerQuote: No-frills room. Clean, quiet, and 5 minutes to ITPL main gate. Best for someone just starting out.

title: Affordable 1BHK in Whitefield
ownerQuote: Very convenient for tech park employees. Society has a good RWA. Water 24/7.

title: Spacious 2BHK in Whitefield
ownerQuote: Airy 2BHK in a gated society. The gym is open 5am to 10pm. Kids' play area in the complex.

title: Budget 1RK in HSR Layout
ownerQuote: Simple room, quiet lane in Sector 1. Best for someone who spends most of their time at office.

title: Comfortable 1BHK in HSR Layout
ownerQuote: Very calm apartment in Sector 3. Close to the famous HSR lake for evening walks.

title: Premium 3BHK in HSR Layout Sector 2
ownerQuote: A rare find — large format apartment with a pool view. Great for families. School bus stops right outside.

title: Budget PG in Jayanagar (Mixed)
ownerQuote: Homely PG with vegetarian meals. Jayanagar 4th block is one of Bangalore's best areas for food and shopping.

title: 2BHK in Jayanagar 3rd Block
ownerQuote: Old Bangalore charm. Large rooms, great ventilation. Very close to temples and parks.

title: Spacious 3BHK in Jayanagar 9th Block
ownerQuote: Massive 3BHK with a study room. Best locality for families — great schools, hospitals and parks all within 1km.

title: Budget PG in JP Nagar 7th Phase
ownerQuote: Very affordable, vegetarian meals, clean bathrooms. Bus to Electronic City and BTM runs every 15 minutes.

title: 1RK in JP Nagar 6th Phase
ownerQuote: Ground floor room with attached bath. Street is full of small eateries. Very safe area.

title: Bright 1BHK in JP Nagar 5th Phase
ownerQuote: Good ventilation, nice neighbors. Rajarajeshwari circle is a 10-minute bus ride for shopping.

title: Large 2BHK in JP Nagar 2nd Phase
ownerQuote: Brand new construction, unfurnished. Very close to JP Nagar metro station under construction.

title: Budget PG in Electronic City Phase 2
ownerQuote: Located in Phase 2, opposite Infosys gate. Best option for new joiners who haven't received first salary yet.

title: 1RK in Electronic City Phase 1
ownerQuote: Self-contained room. Good for single working professional. Flyover access to Hosur Road is very convenient.

title: 2BHK in Electronic City Phase 1
ownerQuote: Good size apartment for the price. Two big bedrooms. Society has a running track. Very popular with IT couples.

title: Premium 3BHK in Electronic City
ownerQuote: Premium gated complex, best in Elec City. Pool, gym, clubhouse. Walking distance to Infosys and KIADB tech park.

title: Budget PG in Marathahalli (Male)
ownerQuote: Good PG for tech employees. 3 meals, laundry on Sundays. The outer ring road is walkable.

title: 1RK in Marathahalli Bridge Area
ownerQuote: Convenient room right near the bridge. Very close to Outer Ring Road startups and e-commerce offices.

title: 2BHK in Marathahalli near Wipro
ownerQuote: 10 min to Wipro, 15 to Manyata. Great connectivity. Society has 24/7 security and intercom.

title: Premium 3BHK in Marathahalli
ownerQuote: Top-tier complex on the Outer Ring Road tech corridor. Smart home features — app-controlled lights and AC.

title: 1RK in BTM Layout 2nd Stage
ownerQuote: Very cheap, very close to Madiwala market. Local buses to Koramangala and Silk Board.

title: Cozy 1BHK in BTM Layout
ownerQuote: Very clean 1BHK, fully tiled. Aminia bakery is around the corner. 10 min to HSR or Koramangala.

title: Premium 3BHK in BTM Layout
ownerQuote: Largest apartments in BTM with a great layout. Recently renovated with modular kitchen and wardrobes.

title: Budget PG in Bellandur
ownerQuote: Clean and safe PG near Sarjapur Road. Very close to Amazon, Cisco and Accenture offices.

title: 1RK in Bellandur near Sarjapur Road
ownerQuote: Well-maintained independent room. Cab pickup for major tech parks available from the main road.

title: Modern 1BHK in Bellandur
ownerQuote: New-age 1BHK with smart TV and modular kitchen. 15-minute cab to Ecospace and Manyata Tech Parks.

title: Luxurious 3BHK in Bellandur Gated Complex
ownerQuote: Prestige complex with 5-star amenities. Concierge, yoga studio, and a co-working lounge for WFH days.

title: Budget PG near MG Road (Male)
ownerQuote: Living on MG Road at this price is rare. Dorms are clean and the common room has a TV.

title: 1RK on Museum Road near MG Road
ownerQuote: A true city-centre studio. Tram-style narrow building, lots of character. Right above good restaurants.

title: 2BHK Serviced Apartment near MG Road
ownerQuote: Hotel-managed serviced apartment. Housekeeping twice a week. Amazing for expats or senior executives.

title: Luxury 3BHK near MG Road
ownerQuote: Grand 3BHK with city skyline views. Floor-to-ceiling windows, private terrace, concierge. MG Road doesn't get more premium.
